parameters.body:
={
  "tenant_id":        "{{ $('Bot Engine').item.json.tenantId }}",
  "order_number":     "ORD-{{ Date.now() }}",
  "customer_name":    {{ JSON.stringify($('Bot Engine').item.json.createOrder.customerName) }},
  "customer_phone":   "{{ $('Bot Engine').item.json.senderPhone }}",
  "customer_address": {{ JSON.stringify($('Bot Engine').item.json.createOrder.address) }},
  "delivery_date":    null,
  "channel":          "whatsapp",
  "status":           "{{ $('Bot Engine').item.json.createOrder.status }}",
  "total":            {{ $('Bot Engine').item.json.createOrder.cart.reduce((s,i) => s + i.price * i.qty, 0) }},
  "notes":            "Livraison demandée : {{ $('Bot Engine').item.json.createOrder.deliveryDate }}"
}
